name: The Bearded Lady, Soothsayer
text:
At the beginning of your upkeep, surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library. Put any number into your graveyard and the rest back on top in any order.)
{1}{B}, {T}: Each opponent reveals their hand. The beard sees all and judges most of it.
flavorText: The beard is real. The fortunes are negotiable. The cover charge is not.
